title: Auth hub follow-up fixes (setup-beskid-web, submodules)

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Auth hub follow-up fixes (setup-beskid-web, submodules)

## Scope

Harden auth hub rollout across web consumers: bump `beskid_web_common`, tracker, and nexus submodule pointers; align setup-beskid-web and AGENTS auth guidance after the initial scaffold.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** In Progress

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## In progress

Iterates auth hub integration: bumps `beskid_web_common`, `beskid_tracker`, and `beskid_nexus` pointers; adjusts setup-beskid-web action and AGENTS auth guidance after initial scaffold.
